title: Monday.com and Clockify

posts.author: Giulio (Giulio)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,
did any of you have ever managed to create a connection between Monday.com and Clockify?
I don’t mean on time tracker (this is already working) but rather on the board level.

What I am looking for is:

  • every time I create a new invoice in a Monday.com board
  • a new expense (with the same information) is created in Clockify

it may be quite tricky, I am wondering if Zapier can help on this.

Thanks

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Giulio

Welcome to the community!

We have built a monday.com <> Clockify integration and have just started the app review process to have this available on the marketplace.

It would be good to jump on a call to discuss how we can add this to our existing integration to meet your requirements.

Feel free to book in a time that suits you using this link

posts.author: Giulio (Giulio)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mitchell,

thanks for your answer.
Sounds good. You can also present me the key features you are developing from Monday.com to Clockify.
See you soon

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Giulio sorry for the late reply.

We currenttly sync timesheets, projects and clients

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Giulio ,

I can integrate clockify with monday.com as per your requirement by customising the integration recipe .

I have already delivered the similar requirement for QB before.

Let me know if you’re interested in sharing your thoughts.

You can reach out to me at aquibcs@outlook.com

posts.author: Giulio (Giulio)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mitchell,

thanks for your answer and for sharing in details the possibilities.
Then I think you don’t have this feature yet, as right now I am just needing to sync once specific Monday com board with the Clockify Expense.

I still booked a slot in your calendar for a quick call. Feel free to withdraw it if you think you cannot support me on this.

Thanks a lot again.
Giulio

posts.author: reidd (Reidd)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a timeline on when this will be available

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @reidd and welcome to the community!

A timeline on when will what be available?

posts.author: Giulio (Giulio)
posts.cookedHtml:
That would be great to know
If Monday.com is planning to create this integration or not.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again,

I do not have an ETA on when or if this will be created on our end.

I would not count on it being created soon.

Let me know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.cookedHtml:
